heading: Rank: commissioned officers serving under temporary appointments
label: 7222 Rank: commissioned officers serving under temporary appointments
text: The President may, in accordance with the needs of the Army, adjust dates of rank of commissioned officers of the Army serving in temporary grades.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)357210:506d(c) (last sentence).(last sentence), .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 515(c)61 Stat. 907The word “commissioned” is inserted for clarity, since the source statute related only to commissioned officers. The words “in his discretion, from time to time” are omitted as surplusage.
Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 7222 to 7224 were renumbered sections 8622 to 8624 of this title, respectively.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 3572 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
